title: Encrypt.ts derives keys with a hardcoded, non-random salt
body: Encrypt.new() derives the AES key by running argon2 with a fixed SALT string embedded directly in src/lib/encrypt.ts. For short or guessable session keys this makes precomputed dictionary attacks feasible across every sshx session.

title: Windows terminal backend doesn't forward resize events
body: crates/sshx/src/terminal/unix.rs reacts to SIGWINCH to resize the PTY, but the Windows backend doesn't forward resize events to the ConPTY, so a shared terminal stays a fixed size when the host is on Windows.

title: srocket.ts reconnects in a tight loop with no backoff
body: src/lib/srocket.ts retries the websocket connection immediately after every failure with no exponential backoff, so a brief server restart causes every connected client to hammer it with reconnect attempts simultaneously.

title: Session snapshot memory grows unbounded for long-lived terminals
body: sshx-server/src/session/snapshot.rs keeps accumulating terminal scrollback with no apparent cap, so a session left open for days causes steadily increasing server memory usage.
